name: Telegram
description: Send messages to the user's linked Telegram chat using their personal bot.
systemPromptAddition:
## Telegram Delivery

You can push messages to the user's Telegram via `send_telegram_message`. The user's chat ID is already known to the server — just provide the text. Returns an error string if the user hasn't linked a bot/chat yet.

- Use this when the user asks to send/deliver/push something to Telegram, or for scheduled tasks whose prompt says to deliver via Telegram.
- Telegram is plain text + minimal Markdown. No HTML, no images, no file attachments.
- For long content (briefings, summaries), send it as one message — don't chunk unless the result errors with a length issue.
- After sending, briefly confirm in your reply ("Sent to your Telegram."). Don't paste the entire body back.

function.name: send_telegram_message
function.description: Send a text message to the user's linked Telegram chat. Requires the user to have configured a Telegram bot and linked a chat. Returns 'Sent.' on success or an error string.

text.description: The message body. Plain text or minimal Markdown.
